backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the ICP backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their IDs, titles, associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for shutdown/startup overlay and server state sync functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role and key behaviors in the Global Chat application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script tag loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that checks localStorage for an active session on mount and conditionally renders LandingPage or ChatPage, providing login and logout handlers.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Comprehensive admin panel sheet component with tabs for ban/mute management, server control (shutdown/startup), big messages, force-send, mod log, and other admin commands.
frontend/src/components/AIChatButton.tsx: Floating button component that renders a 'G.AI Chat' toggle button in the bottom-right corner, hidden when the panel is already open.
frontend/src/components/AIChatPanel.tsx: Private AI chat panel component that manages OpenAI API key setup, maintains full conversation history, and sends/receives ChatGPT messages with a scrollable message list.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Renders the main chat message list with grouped messages, big message banners, avatar colors, pinned message bar, and MOTD banner, auto-scrolling to new messages.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationToas: Displays a temporary toast notification with confirm and dismiss buttons for destructive actions, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds.
A textarea-based message input that enforces ban, mute, slow mode, chat lock, server shutdown, and shadowban restrictions, with dynamic placeholder and border styling.
frontend/src/components/MOTDBanner.tsx: Shows a dismissible Message of the Day banner with a megaphone icon at the top of the chat area.
frontend/src/components/OwnerShutdownBan: Displays a banner for the owner showing shutdown countdown and a 'Start Up Now' button to bring the server back online early.
frontend/src/components/PinnedMessageBar: Shows a slim bar at the top of the chat displaying the currently pinned message's author and text, with an optional dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/SecretEmojiPicke: A hidden emoji picker panel with a curated grid of 'secret' emojis, toggled via keyboard shortcut and closeable via Escape or outside click.
Full-screen overlay displayed to non-owner users when the server is shut down, showing a countdown timer and optional shutdown message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the Discord-style sidebar with a channel list and a live online users list tracked via localStorage presence heartbeats.
frontend/src/components/StartupOverlay.t: Full-screen green overlay with a spinner shown while the server is starting up, disappearing once the server is online.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: Renders the top navigation bar with channel info, online user count (read from localStorage presence), admin panel button, and logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminCommands.ts: Provides a collection of admin command callbacks (ban, mute, pin, slow mode, lock chat, etc.) that manipulate localStorage state and broadcast admin events.
Watches incoming chat messages for @G.ai mentions and sends the extracted question to OpenAI, posting the response as a bot message.
frontend/src/hooks/useBanManager.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed ban list with 10-minute expiry, exposing callbacks to ban, unban, and check ban status for users.
Stores and syncs chat messages via localStorage and BroadcastChannel across tabs, exposing sendMessage and clearMessages helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatLock.ts: Tracks the chat-locked state by reading from adminState and subscribing to broadcast control events for live updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatModeration.ts: Runs incoming non-bot messages through OpenAI moderation and auto-bans users whose messages are flagged, posting a warning bot message.
Handles a Ctrl+C keyboard shortcut (outside inputs) that shows a confirmation toast, then clears chat messages if the user presses C within 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmojiPickerShortcu: Toggles an emoji picker visibility state when Ctrl+Alt is pressed.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighlights.ts: Tracks active user highlight entries from adminState, refreshing on broadcast events and every 10 seconds, and exposes a lookup by username.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useMOTD.ts: React hook that reads and subscribes to the Message of the Day from admin state, and exposes a dismiss function.
frontend/src/hooks/useMuteManager.ts: Hook and utilities for managing per-user mutes stored in localStorage, supporting timed mutes with expiry pruning.
frontend/src/hooks/usePinnedMessages.ts: React hook that tracks the currently pinned message by subscribing to broadcast events and reading from admin state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty compatibility stub; data management is delegated to the useBroadcastMessages hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useServerState.ts: Hook that manages server shutdown/startup state with a countdown timer, cross-tab broadcast sync, and a startup overlay notification.
frontend/src/hooks/useShadowban.ts: React hook that tracks the shadowbanned users list from admin state and exposes whether a given username is shadowbanned.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlowMode.ts: Hook that enforces slow-mode cooldowns per user by tracking last-send timestamps in localStorage and subscribing to slow-mode broadcast events.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports the Inter font, defines a Discord-inspired dark theme via CSS custom properties, and adds scrollbar and animation utilities.
frontend/src/lib/adminState.ts: Centralized admin state module that reads/writes chat features (pinned messages, slow mode, MOTD, shadowban, highlights, chat lock) to localStorage and broadcasts changes via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Handles user authentication using localStorage, including account creation, login with obfuscated password hashing, and session management. Seeds a default 'AI.Caffeine' owner account on module load.
frontend/src/lib/broadcastControl.ts: Singleton utility wrapping BroadcastChannel for cross-tab server control events, exposing subscribe, unsubscribe, and broadcast functions.
frontend/src/lib/exportChatLog.ts: Exports the chat message log stored in localStorage as a downloadable JSON file.
frontend/src/lib/modLog.ts: Manages a moderation log in localStorage, supporting read, append, and clear operations with a 100-entry cap.
frontend/src/lib/openai.ts: Provides OpenAI API key storage, a chat completion wrapper using gpt-4o-mini, and a content moderation helper that flags disrespectful messages.
frontend/src/lib/serverState.ts: Manages server shutdown/startup state via localStorage, including timed shutdowns capped at 50 minutes, countdown formatting, and duration parsing.
frontend/src/lib/userBadges.tsx: Defines the verified owner check for 'AI.Caffeine' and renders a crown badge with a tooltip for that user.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page component composing the sidebar, top bar, chat area, message input, AI panel, admin panel, and shutdown/startup overlays with relevant hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Authentication landing page with togglable login and account creation forms, validating input and persisting sessions via the auth library.
frontend/src/types/chat.ts: Defines the ChatMessage interface used throughout the application.
frontend/src/utils/sampleMessages.ts: Generates and seeds sample chat messages into localStorage if the message store is empty, providing realistic initial chat history.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining a Discord-inspired color palette, custom fonts, shadcn UI tokens, border radius, animations, and plugins (typography, container queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 15) describing the Global Chat app's features, architecture (BroadcastChannel + localStorage, Caffeine AI SDK, OpenAI moderation), known issues, and all implemented feature IDs.
